output:
D3.3 Complete ✅

Created:
- review_manager.py — HITL review orchestration (initiate, respond, status)

Modified:
- pulse.py — Added 4 new v2 lifecycle commands (plan, review, approve, sync-drive)

Tests Passed:
- All syntax checks pass
- initiate generates proper SMS with drop/stream counts
- respond "go" advances to building
- respond "revise: X" captures feedback, reverts to planning
- respond "cancel" marks cancelled
- Revision history tracked
- Graceful Drive degradation

Note: outpost_manager generates Zo instructions rather than direct Drive ops.
review_manager handles gracefully with local path fallback.
